blocker: INSPIRE v1.3 distributes all timestamps as 'Relative Time' minutes from a shifted reference (schema.csv). Calendar dates cannot be recovered for INSPIRE surgeries; temporal overlap matching requires both datasets to expose absolute dates.
notes: Not runnable: INSPIRE v1.3 distributes timestamps as 'Relative Time' minutes from a shifted reference, so calendar-date overlap matching is not possible with the current INSPIRE release.
